title: crotalaria willdenowiana
intro: Crotalaria willdenowiana, also known as the willdenow's rattle pod, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to Africa, with medicinal properties due to its alkaloid content, particularly the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PAs). The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria willdenowiana include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat these conditions, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
